attributes.description: MySQL query cost, latency, and traffic patterns for SRS routes. Default view: /executeAiQueryStreaming. Change the query bar to any routePattern to compare.
attributes.title: SRS - MySQL Monitoring
Queries by Shard Role

attributes.description: which customer apps drive query load through this endpoint
attributes.title: Top 20 Applications by MySQL Cost
attributes.visState: {"title": "Top 20 Applications by MySQL Cost", "type": "horizontal_bar", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "mysqlNumQueries"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "applicationId", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "customLabel": "application"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": false, "truncate": 200}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "BottomAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "total MySQL queries"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "total MySQL queries", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: count() per bucket split by statusClass — baseline traffic + error regressions in one view
attributes.title: Request Rate by Status Class
attributes.visState: {"title": "Request Rate by Status Class", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "statusClass", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "customLabel": "status class"}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "requests/bucket"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "requests/bucket", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: avg + p95 of mysqlNumQueries — watch for a flat step-up after the forgery-fix deploy
attributes.title: MySQL Queries per Request — avg + p95
attributes.visState: {"title": "MySQL Queries per Request \u2014 avg + p95", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "mysqlNumQueries", "customLabel": "avg"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "mysqlNumQueries", "percents": [95], "keyed": false, "customLabel": "p95"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "queries"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "queries", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "p95", "id": "2"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: avg(mysqlDurationMs) vs avg(durationMs) overlaid — rising mysql at flat total = regression
attributes.title: MySQL Share of Total Request Time
attributes.visState: {"title": "MySQL Share of Total Request Time", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "mysqlDurationMs", "customLabel": "mysql"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "durationMs", "customLabel": "total (LLM + mysql + other)"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "ms (avg)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "ms (avg)", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear", "fill": 0.4}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "fill": 0.4, "data": {"label": "total (LLM + mysql + other)", "id": "2"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: p50/p95/p99 of mysqlDurationMs — p99 movement = slow shard or bad query plan
attributes.title: MySQL Duration (p50 / p95 / p99)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MySQL Duration (p50 / p95 / p99)", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "mysqlDurationMs", "percents": [50, 95, 99], "keyed": false}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "ms"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "ms", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: identify hot integrations, abuse patterns, test accounts skewing aggregates
attributes.title: Top 20 Users by Request Volume
attributes.visState: {"title": "Top 20 Users by Request Volume", "type": "horizontal_bar", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "userId", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "customLabel": "user"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": false, "truncate": 200}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "BottomAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "requests"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "requests", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}
